stories.headline: Peruvian presidential election results delayed as tens of thousands get one-day voting extension
stories.summary: Peruvian voters will not have to wait at least one additional day to learn the results of the country’s presidential elections due to an issue authorities said was logistical, which left thousands of people unable to vote on Sunday.

stories.headline: Hong Kong Issues 53% More IPO Banker Licenses to Ease Shortage

stories.headline: Wise on Track for Nasdaq Listing in May as Income Jumps 24%

stories.headline: Hormuz Blockade Is a US-Iran 'Game of Chicken': Roubini
stories.summary: Economist and CEO Nouriel Roubini says the planned US naval blockade in the Strait of Hormuz is merely a “game of chicken” which Iran can outlast, and could allow Tehran to recover, keep oil prices higher and push global growth weaker. He speaks to Bloomberg's David Ingles at the Greenwich Economic Forum in Hong Kong. (Source: Bloomberg)
